summary: Bugfix verification + regression for AI Tutor. Ran prepared pytest suite (24 tests) against live backend URL; all PASSED in 45.8s. Frontend Playwright smoke covered landing, login, dashboard, theme toggle, sidebar nav (AI Tutor/Quizzes/Study Planner/Leaderboard/Profile), chat send (GPT-5.2), quiz page, study-plan generate + Download PDF (Blob URL XSS fix verified), logout. Zero React key warnings and zero console errors during chat/dashboard/quiz/study-plan flows.
passed: BUGFIX: Circular import resolved — backend boots, /api/auth/login + /api/auth/me + /api/chat all 200 (test_login_student, test_me, test_chat_gpt, test_chat_claude)
BUGFIX: StudyPlan PDF Download opens NEW TAB with blob: URL (blob:https://ai-tutor-hub-...) — content_len=5255, no document.write, no XSS console error
BUGFIX: AuthContext logout — clicking Logout in sidebar redirects to /login, zero console errors during logout flow
BUGFIX: React stable keys — 0 'unique key' warnings across Dashboard, Chat (message send), Quiz page, Study Plan
BUGFIX: Dashboard renders (weak topics/subject_progress/recent_quizzes) with no key warnings
BUGFIX: Chat keys — sent message via /chat, AI response received, no key warnings
REG: POST /api/auth/register (new email) → token+user ✅
REG: POST /api/auth/login student & admin (role=admin) ✅; bad password → 401
REG: GET /api/auth/me ✅; unauth → 401
REG: GET /api/meta/subjects (Mathematics + beginner present) ✅
REG: PUT /api/profile updates skill_level/goal ✅
REG: POST /api/chat gpt-5.2 ✅ (response string)
REG: POST /api/chat claude-sonnet-4.5 ✅
REG: POST /api/quiz/generate ✅ — questions returned WITHOUT 'answer' field (asserted per question)
REG: POST /api/quiz/submit ✅ — score/results/new_level/xp_gain present
REG: POST /api/study-plan ✅ — plan returned
REG: GET /api/dashboard ✅ — stats/subject_progress/weak_topics/trend/badges/recent_quizzes + predicted_next_score present
REG: GET /api/leaderboard ✅ — items present
REG: GET /api/admin/students with student token → 403; with admin token → 200
REG: GET /api/admin/analytics + /api/admin/logs (admin) ✅; logs forbidden for student → 403
FE: Landing loads (title 'Emergent | Fullstack App')
FE: Login form submits (student@test.com / Student@123) → /dashboard
FE: 'Continue with Google' button visible on /login (live OAuth skipped per instruction)
FE: Theme toggle works — html className 'dark' → '' (light mode switched)
FE: Sidebar nav works — Dashboard / AI Tutor (/chat) / Quizzes / Study Planner / Leaderboard / Profile all linked
notes: Backend test run: cd /app && REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=... python -m pytest backend/tests/backend_test.py — 24 passed in 45.81s. PDF Blob URL verified by opening expected new tab and reading url scheme 'blob:https://ai...'. Some incidental 401s observed earlier on a separate sequence were from /api/auth/me calls fired during pre-login navigation (expected, not an error). Adaptive difficulty rule (≥0.8 raises, <0.4 lowers user.level) covered indirectly via quiz_submit returning new_level — deeper threshold testing deferred to full QA.
